overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a cowboy character walking through a dark, narrow alleyway at night. The scene transitions from a debris-filled back alley into a tight brick corridor with overhead lighting, with rain beginning to fall as the character approaches a metal exit gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with wooden debris

events.description: moving from the wider alley entrance into the narrow brick passage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark alley, passing wooden barricades and a closed door

entered.detail: dark wooden double doors with vertical panels set in a stone frame
broken wooden fence planks and debris leaning against the wall
weathered brick wall with green moss and grime
rough brick wall with visible mortar lines
series of hanging street lamps illuminating the passage ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow back alley at night, with a wooden door on the left and broken wooden barricades on the right. The character walks forward into an increasingly tight passage between high brick walls, with artificial lights visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered brick corridor with overhead lighting

events.description: passing under overhead street lamps creating pools of warm light on the walls

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrow brick corridor, moving between patches of light and shadow

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through a tight brick corridor illuminated by overhead lamps. The wooden structures from the entrance have passed out of view, leaving only the weathered brick walls converging toward a distant light source.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked passage leading to gated exit

events.description: rain begins falling in the alleyway, visible as vertical streaks in the lamplight
approaching the metal exit gate at the end of the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the falling rain toward the illuminated exit gate

entered.detail: wrought iron gate blocking the alley exit with vertical bars
warm orange lights visible through and beyond the metal gate

segments.scene_description: Rain begins to fall in the narrow passage as the character approaches the end of the alley. A metal exit gate comes into view, backlit by warm lights from the street beyond, while the brick walls continue to flank the path on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, narrow alleyway that gradually transitions from a debris-filled passage into a rain-slicked corridor leading toward a bright exit. It begins beside a wooden door and broken barricades, moving forward as the space tightens between high brick walls. As the wooden structures fade from view, the scene shifts into a confined brick corridor illuminated by overhead lamps that cast a glow on the weathered surfaces. The environment then transforms as rain begins to fall, with the camera proceeding toward the end of the passage. Finally, the path opens up to a metal exit gate backlit by the warm, inviting lights of the street beyond.
